nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Called by WF5 (Tier 1 auto) or WF8 (dashboard approve & send) with { draft_id, message_id, channel }.

nodes.name: Fetch Draft + Message
nodes.notes: GET /api/messages/:id with drafts. Use edited_text if present, else draft_text.

nodes.name: Route by Channel
nodes.notes: Branch on message.channel: gmail → Gmail API, whatsapp → Meta Cloud API, instagram → Meta Graph API.

nodes.name: Send via Gmail
nodes.notes: Reply in thread (thread_id), apply 'AI-Sent' label. 3 retries with exponential backoff.

nodes.name: Send via WhatsApp
nodes.notes: Meta Cloud API: POST /{phone-number-id}/messages with reply text.

nodes.name: Send via Instagram
nodes.notes: Meta Graph API: POST /me/messages with reply text.

nodes.name: Report Result
nodes.notes: POST /api/webhooks/n8n/send-result with { draft_id, message_id, success, sent_at }.
